RULING:
DEFENDANT UNION PACIFIC RAILROAD COMPANY'S MOTION TO ABATE ENTIRE ACTION PENDING JOINDER OF PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF DECEDENT ESTATE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Company's motion to abate entire action pending joinder of personal representative of decedent's estate is granted. An action under FELA may be maintained only by decedent's personal representative. (45 U.S.C. 59.) It is undisputed that no personal representative has been appointed, therefore no FELA claim may be pursued. This action is stayed pending joinder of a personal representative in compliance with 45 U.S.C. section 59. If and when such personal representative is appointed, plaintiffs shall file a motion to revive the action. Order signed in open court.
